_comment: VENDORED CONTRACT — keep byte-identical in both repos: turbo-replies (lib/shared/verticals.contract.json) and turboreplies-email-automation (src/shared/verticals.contract.json). It is the single source of truth for the demo deep-link verticals and locales shared by the website demo and the outreach emails. If you change a vertical slug or a locale here, copy this file to the other repo. The website locale list must also stay in sync with lib/i18n/config.ts.
